topics: Introduction to PLC – Understanding PLC hardware and software, basic programming in Ladder Logic
PLC Programming I – Development of basic automation tasks using PLC, simple start-stop circuits
PLC Programming II – Advanced PLC programming concepts, timer and counter functions
Basic Pneumatic Systems – Introduction to pneumatic components, designing and implementing basic pneumatic circuits
Electro-Pneumatic Systems – Integration of electrical control with pneumatic systems, troubleshooting electro-pneumatic circuits
Basic Hydraulic Systems – Introduction to hydraulic components and systems, designing basic hydraulic circuits
Electro-Hydraulic Systems – Integrating electrical control with hydraulic systems, practical implementation and troubleshooting
Introduction to SCADA Systems – Basics of SCADA, configuring SCADA for monitoring and control applications
SCADA Simulation – Simulating industrial processes using SCADA, developing human-machine interfaces (HMIs)
Automation Studio Software – Designing and simulating automation systems using Automation Studio, final project integrating PLC, pneumatic, hydraulic, and SCADA systems
Comprehensive Project 1 – Combine PLC and SCADA systems into a single automated process
Comprehensive Project 2 – Combine PLC, electro-pneumatic, and electro-hydraulic systems into a single automated process
